title: <div>So if I could translate/interpret your major feedback for EL: Sandra is one
content: So if I could translate/interpret your major feedback for EL: Sandra is one note, and that becomes most apparent in the second act. As an antagonist she should evolve, she also has sadness in her that we're not getting from the current scenes so there's no empathy there. Act three (Julia and Court) there's a loss of an emotional center for El. I haven't quite stuck the landing.
context: From document: So if I could translate/interpret your major feedback for EL: Sandra…
